regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-24. Fed Chair Kevin Warsh held rates at 3.50-3.75% (June 17 decision) but dot plot projects a majority of FOMC members expecting at least one hike by year-end; September hike probability now ~68% (up from ~56% last week) — the most hawkish Fed posture in this cycle. 10Y Treasury yield 4.50%. DXY at 101.35, EUR/USD 1.1371 (dollar firmer, headwind for risk assets and gold). Strong PMI data supports resilient economy but also locks in hawkish stance. S&P 500 near ATH (~7,420, SPY $733.58); market digesting the hawkish repricing. Crypto: BTC $62,566 (+0.28%), ETH $1,664 (+0.63%), SOL $69.17 (+0.30%); Fear and Greed index dropped sharply to 17 (Extreme Fear, from 23 yesterday). Total crypto market cap $2.23T (+0.37%); BTC dominance 56.25%. All positions above their invalidation levels. Crypto sleeve at 19.69% of NAV (within 20% neutral cap). Cash at 13.85% of NAV (above 5% minimum). Zero trades today: hawkish Fed repricing + elevated DXY argue against adding risk; all existing theses intact; cash held as dry powder for better entries.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta (13.18% NAV). S&P near ATH (~7,420) with resilient broad index; SPY $733.58 slightly below avgCost $741.75. Broad diversification anchor; holds value even if specific names underperform.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward multiple hikes pushing SPY into a technical downtrend.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $200.04 (below $208.44 avgCost, 14.27% NAV). AI capex cycle intact; continued pullback from prior highs offers opportunity to add on risk-on regime shift. Highest-conviction growth driver for the 33% CAGR target.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $373.94 (below $391.98 avgCost, 14.60% NAV). Azure + Copilot revenue growing; rate headwind temporary. Thesis intact — holding through weakness.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $346.13 (below $366.53 avgCost, 13.95% NAV). Search monopoly and cloud revenue dominant; $84.75B capital raise funds $180-190B capex plan. HOLD.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $409.25 (above $408.52 avgCost, 6.16% NAV). Medical-cost and regulatory headwinds; retained as defensive ballast. Performing well relative to growth names.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $377.32 (below $386.54 avgCost, 4.27% NAV). Central-bank buying supportive; strong DXY is a headwind but small size prevents meaningful drag on CAGR target. Retained as stagflation/inflation optionality.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal sustained; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $62,566 (below $64,629 avgCost, 14.40% NAV). F&G 17 (Extreme Fear) is contrarian bullish signal; BTC dominance 56.25% stable. Well-positioned for next risk-on expansion when sleeve cap rises to 35%.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,664.48 (near $1,667.47 avgCost, 4.10% NAV). ETH dominance recovering to 9.0%; asymmetric upside when risk-on returns and capital rotates into alts. Small position appropriate.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $69.17 (above $67.81 avgCost, 1.20% NAV). Small position to ride volatility; first to scale up when regime flips to risk-on and crypto sleeve cap expands to 35%.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
